id: delete-space
title: "Delete A Space"
description: "Delete a space by space ID, optionally deleting child spaces."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete A Space"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces/delete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete a space by space ID, optionally deleting child spaces.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["spaceId"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID."},"deleteChildren":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Whether to delete child spaces."}},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","deleteChildren":false},"title":"DeleteSpaceRequest"},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","deleteChildren":false}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
